data.title: Arcium Completes Angel Round Financing, Jupiter, Meow and Other Investors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Arcium, a confidential computing network, announced the completion of its angel round of financing, with participation from Jupiter co-founder Meow, MegaETH founding team member Namik, Jupiter co-founder Siong, and others. In addition, Arcium also conducted some community fundraising through echo. So far, the total financing amount has reached 11 million US dollars.

data.title: The BTCFi protocol Corn airdrop query page is now online, with a total of 2.1 billion tokens, 52% of which are allocated to the community
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BTCFi protocol Corn posted on the X platform that the airdrop query page has been launched. According to its token economics, the total supply of tokens is 2.1 billion, and the initial circulation supply is 525 million (25%), of which: 
· 52% allocated to the community: 10% for initial token allocation, 5% for ecosystem builders, 33.3% for user issuance and network security, and 3.7% for community fundraising
· 13% allocated to early supporters: seed round investors and institutional participants in Legion sales
· 25% allocated to core contributors: engineers, products, business development, marketing and core builders
· 10% allocated to the foundation
Previously, Corn, an Ethereum L2 network focusing on Bitcoin DeFi, completed a $8.3 million community round of financing through Legion, which was oversubscribed seven times within a few hours. The project will launch TGE tokens on Friday (March 28).

data.title: CZ releases GPT-4o generated images but says he won't change his social media profile picture
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder CZ released ChatGPT's GPT-4o generated pictures on the X platform and wrote: "I may be the last person to try this person, but I will not change the avatar of the X platform. I personally prefer non-ghibli style pictures."

data.title: The total supply of GUNZ (GUN) tokens is 10 billion, and Launchpool accounts for 4% of the total
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Launchpool announced that it has launched the 66th project GUNZ (GUN), an L1 public chain for AAA games developed by Gunzilla Games. According to the disclosed information, the total supply of GUNZ (GUN) tokens is 10 billion, the initial circulation is 604,500,000 GUN (6.05% of the total supply of tokens), and the total Launchpool is 400,000,000 GUN (4% of the total supply of tokens). Smart contracts will be launched at the time of public release.

data.title: MilkyWay Foundation official account registration is online
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The official account of the liquidity staking agreement MilkyWay Foundation @MilkyWayFDN has been registered and launched.

data.title: Analyst Predicts Significant Growth in Yield-Generating Stablecoins Market Share
data.description: According to PANews, JPMorgan analyst Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou forecasts that yield-generating stablecoins could see their market share rise from the current 6% to 50% in the future. The analyst notes that these stablecoins are increasingly appealing to investors, akin to traditional money market funds, particularly in the current high-interest rate environment.

data.title: Binance will launch WALUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the WALUSDT perpetual contract at 15:30 (UTC) on March 27, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 25 times. The contract supports multi-asset mode, and users can use BTC and other currencies as margin for trading. The copy trading function will be available within 24 hours of the contract launch. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: JPMorgan Chase: The market share of yield-based stablecoins may increase to 50%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News JPMorgan analysts said that yield-based stablecoins, including tokenized treasuries, could achieve substantial growth in the future. Analysts including JPMorgan Managing Director Nikolaos Panigirtzoglou wrote in a newly released report that yield-based stablecoins currently account for only 6% of the total stablecoin market value, but may expand significantly, and unless regulations change, it is possible to occupy up to 50% of the market share. In addition, analysts also predict that this growth will continue, especially in today's high-interest environment, and yield-based stablecoins are similar to traditional money market funds in terms of their appeal to investors. (The Block)

data.title: Paul Atkins, the incoming chairman of the U.S. SEC: Current regulation is too complicated, and how to regulate the crypto industry is the top priority
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Paul Atkins, Trump's nominee for Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), will attend the confirmation hearing of the Senate Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs Committee on Thursday morning local time. Paul Atkins said in his prepared remarks: "The current regulatory environment of the U.S. financial system hinders investment and often punishes those who succeed. Unclear, overly complex and cumbersome regulations are stifling capital formation, and American investors are overwhelmed by a large amount of disclosed information that does not help them understand the true risks of investment. It's time to reset priorities and restore common sense to the SEC." In addition, Paul Atkins is expected to discuss how to regulate the cryptocurrency industry, which he said would be his top priority as Chairman of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. (CNBC)

data.title: SBF has been transferred to a transit jail in Oklahoma City
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The Federal Bureau of Prisons of the United States announced that Sam Bankman-Fried has been transferred to a transit prison in Oklahoma City. This measure was because he conducted an unauthorized remote video interview with Tucker Carlson at the Brooklyn Metropolitan Detention Center earlier this month.
The transit prison where SBF was transferred is called Oklahoma City Federal Transfer Center. He will then be transferred to another prison to serve the remaining fraud sentence. It is reported that his release date is scheduled for November 17, 2044. (The Block)
